leadText: The Old Cemetery (Japanese: いにしえの墓地 Ancient Cemetery) is a location in the Galar region. It is contained within the Giant's Bed.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] The Old Cemetery is an old graveyard filled with worn-out tombstones. One of the crop plots where the Carrot Seeds can be planted are also located here. After completing The Crown Tundra storyline, the player can visit here at nighttime to witness an encounter between Peony and Oleana .
